title: Edge Case - Verify behavior with slow network connection
description: Tests the user experience during login and OTP verification on a slow or high-latency network.
preconditions: Network is throttled to a slow speed (e.g., 2G).

steps.description: 1. On the Login screen, enter a valid phone number and tap 'लॉगिन करें'.
2. Verify a loading indicator is displayed and remains visible until the OTP screen loads.
3. On the OTP screen, enter the correct OTP.
4. Verify a loading indicator is displayed and remains visible until the Home screen loads.

expected_result: The app remains responsive, displays loading indicators appropriately, and does not time out prematurely. The user is eventually logged in.
